mapper.select: SELECT support_id AS supportNo, writer_id AS writerId, support_type AS category, title, content, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM support ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT support_id AS supportNo, writer_id AS writerId, support_type AS category, title, content, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM support WHERE support_id = #{supportNo}

SELECT SUPPORT_A_ID AS answerId, support_id AS supportNo, member_id AS memberId, answer_content AS answerContent, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM support_answer WHERE support_id = #{supportNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO support_answer ( SUPPORT_A_ID, support_id, member_id, answer_content, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( support_answer_seq.NEXTVAL, #{supportNo}, #{memberId}, #{answerContent}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE support SET status = '답변완료', updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE support_id = #{supportNo}
mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(days.dt, 'MM.DD') AS targetDate, NVL(COUNT(CASE WHEN s.status = '답변완료' THEN 1 END), 0) AS completedCount, NVL(COUNT(CASE WHEN s.status = '대기중' THEN 1 END), 0) AS pendingCount FROM ( SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) - (LEVEL - 1) AS dt FROM DUAL CONNECT BY LEVEL <= 7 ) days LEFT JOIN support s ON TRUNC(s.created_at) = days.dt AND s.delete_yn = 0 GROUP BY days.dt ORDER BY days.dt ASC

SELECT file_id AS fileId, support_id AS supportNo, file_name AS fileName, file_ori_name AS fileOriName, file_path AS filePath, file_size AS fileSize, created_at AS createdAt FROM support_file WHERE support_id = #{supportNo}
